name: Morphing Crystal
description: This weapon's shape constantly flows and reforms in slightly different compositions. You can reshape a morphing weapon into any other melee or thrown weapon of the same size and type (light, one-handed, or two-handed). If a single weapon created with the morphing property becomes a double weapon, only one end of the double weapon retains the weapon's magical bonus. If a double weapon created with the morphing property becomes a single weapon, it can have the properties of either end of the original double weapon.
